steps.title: Recognize linearity and extract the slope
steps.content: The function $F(x) = \frac{9}{5}(x - 273.15) + 32$ is linear. For a linear function, when the input changes by some amount, the output changes by slope $\times$ change in input. The constant terms don't affect the change. Here, the slope is $\frac{9}{5}$.

steps.title: Apply the slope relationship
steps.content:
Since temperature increased by 7.70 kelvins, the increase in Fahrenheit equals:
$$\Delta F = \frac{9}{5} \times 7.70$$

steps.title: Compute the increase
steps.content:
$$\Delta F = \frac{9}{5} \times 7.70 = 1.8 \times 7.70 = 13.86$$
The temperature increased by 13.86 degrees Fahrenheit.
